content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 13, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 13, 2026, focused on enhancing core infrastructure with a new shared batch-queue system to improve concurrency and task management. Additionally, the project underwent significant dependency maintenance, updating various cargo and npm/yarn packages across the repository to ensure stability and security.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Core Infrastructure & Concurrency**
*   Introduced a new `utils/batch-queue` system, including `PriorityQueue`, `BatchProcessor`, `TaskDrain`, and `Semaphore`.
*   Implemented shared batch-queue drains and bounded knowledge embeddings to unify concurrency, retry logic, and task storage for embedding drains, action-filter index builds, and prompt-batcher affinity tasks ([#6722](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6722)).

**Dependency Maintenance**
*   Performed a comprehensive update of the cargo group across 21 directories, including updates to `bytes`, `quinn-proto`, and `rustls-webpki` ([#6724](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6724)).
*   Updated the npm_and_yarn group across 11 directories, including a version bump for `drizzle-orm` ([#6723](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6723)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#6727](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6727): feat(skills): add MiniMax-AI/cli as bundled skill.
*   [#6726](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6726): chore(deps): bump langchain-text-splitters from 0.3.8 to 0.3.9 in /packages/benchmarks/solana/solana-gym-env.
*   [#6725](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6725): chore(deps): bump the uv group across 2 directories with 20 updates.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
